title: Session 20 — Darkpass Destruction
bodyText:
# What happened
The infiltration. Everyone in the bag; **Felson invisible + flight ale** carried them over the walls and through the sleeping guild, in through Brolin's old window into **Darkpass Manor**. Cumb picked Root's office lock — a **hidden journal** triggered a trap and woke Root.

The confrontation: Felson **transformed into a shadow-copy of Varen's Stalker**, rattling Root. A **fireball blew a hole in the manor**, waking the town. Root talked — claimed his family was dead, mocked Brolin, boasted of **access to a hidden source of powerful magic** — then tried to **Misty Step away. The spell failed.** Only Felson saw why: **Mr. Spells stood nearby — "Our business is over" — and vanished.**

Root was knocked unconscious. **Brolin and Eira finished it; Eira obliterated the body.** They took his weapons and armor, dove into the bag, and escaped as the guild rushed the explosion.
